hero.title: Goals for a Cure
hero.subheading: A tournament to raise money for Canadian Cancer Society

mission.heading: Kick Cancer out the game
mission.body: We are turning our passion for soccer into a force for change. By uniting Milton’s youth on the pitch, we aim to raise $5,000 for the Canadian Cancer Society and ensure no one faces cancer alone.

bullets.text: A tournament designed by students, for students.
100% of all tournament proceeds go directly to the cause.
Every goal scored supports life-saving cancer research.

mission.peopleBody: We are a group of dedicated, driven, and passionate high school students from Milton, Ontario looking to end a leading cause of death worldwide, cancer. Each member of our group has been affected by this obstacle, whether it's a family or relative who has faced it.

tournament.title: Tournament Overview
tournament.description: Youth aged 14–18 can compete in a 7-game, 6v6 scrimmage tournament. As teams are eliminated, the playing area expands across the pitch to increase the challenge. Matches are 12 minutes long, featuring a 2-minute halftime to keep players energized.
tournament.whereAddress: Milton Community Field #3, Milton, ON L9T 8H5
whyBullets: There will be a photographer there to take team photos and action shots.
The top two teams take home Footy4Hope medals, with a small prize for the first-place winners.
Every dollar goes to the Canadian Cancer Society, so you're supporting a great cause while having a good time.

fundraising.noteHtml: 100% of all money made from the tournament goes to Canadian Cancer Society.

support.heading: Support the movement.
support.intro: Are you a local business ready to make a difference? Help cover our operational costs so more of every dollar goes directly to the fight against cancer. Be part of a movement that turns passion into action.
promoBullets: Recognition at the event (based on selection)
Logo featured at the end of promotional videos
Logo placement on event shirts and banners (based on selection)
Personalized thank-you poster with a group photo from the event
support.closing: By supporting us, you’re doing more than just reaching new audiences through publicity, you’re helping fund initiatives that make a feasible impact, directly contributing to the fight against cancer and supporting the lives of those affected by it.
